**What problem are you trying to solve?**
<!-- Describe the pain point or use case. Not the proposed solution yet —
     the problem. This helps avoid the XY problem. -->

**Proposed solution (optional)**
<!-- How you imagine this could work. Skip if you'd rather discuss the
     problem first. -->

**Alternatives considered**
<!-- Any workarounds you've tried, or other approaches you weighed. -->

**Scope check**
- [ ] This fits the project's scope (desktop AI companion: chat, memory,
      Live2D, voice, screen awareness).
- [ ] I've checked there's no existing issue covering this.
